headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains Outperform on Exelon, Raises Price Target to $58
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst Nicholas Amicucci   maintains Exelon (NASDAQ:EXC) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $55 to $58.
